# CANDIDATE: VWAP_CONTINUATION_RVOL_FLOOR_VARIATION

**Filed:** 2026-06-25
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** new_trigger_branch
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We aim to capture the edge in the VWAP_CONTINUATION setup by varying the rvol floor, specifically exploring the impact of using different rvol thresholds (e.g., 1.3 vs 1.6) on the edge capture and expected edge_capture direction.

## Mechanism

The mechanism involves modifying the VWAP_CONTINUATION setup to incorporate a dynamic rvol floor, which adjusts based on the current market conditions. The rvol floor will be used to filter out low-volatility environments, where the VWAP continuation edge may not be as pronounced.
